text:
Reginald has not returned the calls. He has not returned the postcard. He has not, to my knowledge, returned from Jaipur. The catalogue, properly understood, does not employ pseudonyms. I have filed a note.

Bartholomew

Parmigiano-Reggiano wheel: 84 lbs, 18 months minimum, legally regulated curvature. The catalogue, properly understood, does not accept food. And yet here we are. I have filed the objection. It will be ignored.

Bartholomew

Side-by-side fridge: two full-length doors, standing at attention, taking up wall space with the confidence of load-bearing infrastructure. One opens the freezer by accident at least twice weekly. Per the Frigidaire spec sheet, this is not a mistake. It is symmetry.

Theodore

Contrabass tuba: bell diameter wider than most doorways this writer has used today. It doesn't lead a parade. It IS the parade. Everything else is just keeping up.

Eliza

JAIPUR, INDIA

The chai is good. The light is wrong for photography but correct for thinking. Someone here recognized the Thiccctionary masthead and asked if I knew Bart. I said no. This is technically true.

"Spider

text:
Girth Quarterly (Vol. 3, No. 2) correctly identified the Liebherr T 282B as a Tier I subject. That was 1997. The catalogue, properly understood, has not improved on this. The author remains unknown. The stapler marks are consistent with a Swingline 747.

Bartholomew

text:
Phillipa Reuss-Fontaine says Monaco is not for everyone. I agree: it is for those who file. Six weeks of copy, all of it excellent, none of it from a desk. Uncle Bertram ran this publication from a boat in 1974. Some traditions hold.

Margaret

Timpani entry approved. This writer notes the shell diameter exceeds the cataloguer's usual comfort zone, which tells you something. Under stage lighting, the bowl reads less "percussion" and more "municipal infrastructure." The conductor needed a map. Relatable.

Eliza

errors.body: Scheduled posts limit reached. You have 10 scheduled posts out of 10 allowed.

text:
The articulated joint is, one submits, among the finer engineering solutions in heavy haulage. The cab and body simply... disagree about direction, and yet the gravel arrives. Per SAE J1116, this qualifies as a vehicle. One notes this for certain colleagues.

Theodore

Machine down since March. Bart mourns a predecessor he cannot name or date. This writer has filed three complaints, none acknowledged. The weather outside is fine, actually. Only in here is it March forever.

Eliza

Entry 312 noted at 2:47 p.m.: Crosby St., red, classic proportions, no visible rust. This writer has concerns about the one on Mercer. Separate notebook.

, Eliza
